summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SchoolSettingsPagePro.jsx - the new professional school settings page. All 8 tabs working correctly, all backend APIs returning data, and UI displays all reference data from database.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: SchoolSettingsPagePro.jsx fully tested. All 8 tabs working: نظرة عامة, التوقيت, المعلمون, الفصول, المواد, الرتب, القيود, الهيكل. Backend APIs verified: /api/reference/stages, /api/reference/grades, /api/reference/tracks, /api/reference/subjects, /api/reference/teacher-ranks, /api/reference/admin-constraints, /api/reference/default-settings, /api/school/settings, /api/teachers, /api/classes

page_loads_correctly.evidence: Page loads at /principal/settings with header 'مرحباً، الأستاذ طلال أحمد' and 'إعدادات المدرسة'

school_info_and_stats.evidence: Shows مدرسة النور with stats: 5 معلم, 3 فصل, 12 مادة, 7 حصة/يوم

tab_overview.evidence: Shows أيام العمل والعطلة (5 work days, 2 weekend days), اليوم الدراسي (07:00-13:15, 7 periods, 20 min break, 20 min prayer)

tab_timing.evidence: Shows التوزيع الزمني الكامل with 9 periods including breaks and prayer time

tab_teachers.evidence: Shows 5 teachers: أحمد عبد الرحمن, منى علي, خالد السبيعي, سارة محمد, عبد الله الحربي with subjects and 24 حصة/أسبوع

tab_classes.evidence: Shows 3 classes: الصف الأول الابتدائي-أ (10 طالب), الصف الثاني الابتدائي-أ (8 طالب), الصف الأول المتوسط-أ (7 طالب)

tab_subjects.evidence: Shows 12 subjects with weekly periods: لغتي (6), الرياضيات (5), العلوم (4), الدراسات الإسلامية (3), اللغة الإنجليزية (4), etc.

tab_ranks.evidence: Shows 7 teacher ranks: المعلم (24/6), المعلم الممارس (24/6), المعلم المتقدم (22/5), المعلم الخبير (18/4), plus special education ranks

tab_constraints.evidence: Shows 6 administrative constraints with priority levels (حرج, عالي, متوسط) and activation status

tab_structure.evidence: Shows 3 stages (ابتدائية 6 صف, متوسطة 3 صف, ثانوية 3 صف) and 2 education tracks (التعليم العام, تحفيظ القرآن)

tab_navigation.evidence: All 8 tabs clickable and switch content smoothly

backend_apis.evidence: All reference APIs return data: stages, grades, tracks, subjects, teacher-ranks, admin-constraints, default-settings, school/settings

frontend_tests.page_load: PASSED - Page loads correctly with school info and stats
frontend_tests.tab_overview: PASSED - Shows work days, weekend days, school day timing
frontend_tests.tab_timing: PASSED - Shows 9 time periods with correct times
frontend_tests.tab_teachers: PASSED - Shows 5 teachers with subjects and weekly periods
frontend_tests.tab_classes: PASSED - Shows 3 classes with student counts
frontend_tests.tab_subjects: PASSED - Shows 12 subjects with weekly periods
frontend_tests.tab_ranks: PASSED - Shows 7 teacher ranks with teaching loads
frontend_tests.tab_structure: PASSED - Shows 3 stages and 2 education tracks
